description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:23.4.0-slim Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that runs the commands npm ci and npm run build to install dependencies and build the site. After building, the job compresses every file in the public folder with gzip using find ./public -type f -exec sh -c 'gzip -c "$1" > "$1.gz"' _ {} \; and writes the package version to public/version.txt via node -p 'require("./package.json").version' > public/version.txt. The job publishes the public directory as GitLab Pages, stores it as an artifact, and is configured to run only on the master branch.
